name: Ekoh Beach
short_description: Ekoh Beach is in big trouble after the Great Robot Rebellion! As the new Town Planner you must gather resources, restore buildings, make friends, and unravel the mystery behind the disappearance of quantum scientist Dr. Terra.
detailed_description:
Planet Ekoh99 has been isolated for years following the Great Robot Rebellion. You have been assigned to this tropical planet as its new Town Planner. Rebuild the town, earn the trust of its residents, and uncover the lost truth behind the disappearance of the town’s most famous scientist.

Rebuild

Once a thriving high-tech paradise, Ekoh Beach has fallen into disarray. Use strange hyper-quantum resources to rebuild the town piece by piece. Begin with modest homes, then expand into ambitious projects like an Interdimensional Bakery, Megabrain Library, a Quantum Mechanics Laboratory, and even a Spaceport.

Be Yourself

Start by quickly constructing simple houses, then upgrade them into stylish, sophisticated residences as new building materials become available. Customize buildings with paint and decorations, plant genetically modified flowers each season, and shape a town that reflects your ideals. Personalize your character with new hairstyles, outfits, and accessories — you can even surprise other residents with an unexpected haircut (no guarantees they’ll appreciate it).


Bring the town back to life

A town cannot thrive without its people. New buildings attract new residents, and with over 35 unique NPCs to meet, the town gradually revives into a vibrant community. Build relationships and watch the town evolve over time.


Run for Mayor

As the town rebuilds, earn the trust of its citizens and run for mayor. Unlock powerful town facilities, invest your political capital, and drive forward your biggest project yet.

Uncover the Town's Many Secrets

The robot rebellion may have ended, but its aftermath still lingers beneath the town, with Dr. Terra's ruined laboratory lying in wait within the forest. Explore the mines, investigate the clues left scattered behind, Break the laws of nature itself to find that which is hidden from plain sight...

supported_languages:
English*, Polish, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
